tasks.name: scrape_bids
tasks.description: Scrape CC + BC for new bids

tasks.name: check_email_bids
tasks.description: Scan Gmail for bid invitations (log only)

tasks.name: ingest_email_invites
tasks.description: Parse Gmail invitations -> add to active_bids.json

tasks.name: gmail_organize
tasks.description: Apply Gmail labels (Lost/Follow-ups/Bid Invites/etc.)

tasks.name: track_submissions
tasks.description: Detect submitted proposals from Sent folder, update bid status

tasks.name: crm_sync
tasks.description: Pull CRM statuses (Won/Lost/Submitted/Awaiting) into Carol

tasks.name: gmail_rules_from_crm
tasks.description: Regenerate Gmail labeling rules from CRM (runs before gmail_organize)

tasks.name: crm_writeback
tasks.description: Push Carol's pipeline updates back to CRM Sheet (status changes, new bids)

tasks.name: proposal_audit
tasks.description: Scan Sent folder, extract bid amounts, fill CRM Bid Amount columns

tasks.name: cost_watchdog
tasks.description: Monitor daily Gemini spend; alert at $0.50, kill-switch at $1.50

tasks.name: crm_full_sync
tasks.description: End-of-day full reconciliation: scrape + ingest + sync + writeback

tasks.name: daily_briefing
tasks.description: Morning briefing + email report

tasks.name: followup_intelligence_brief
tasks.description: Per-bid follow-up intelligence: who chased, who replied with what, next action plan

tasks.name: check_followups
tasks.description: Check and notify about due follow-ups
tasks._disabled_reason: Superseded by chase_silent_followups — conflicting cadence + stale Bid# mapping

tasks.name: pipeline_advance
tasks.description: Auto-advance projects with pending steps

tasks.name: bid_reminder_morning
tasks.description: Telegram morning brief (today + tomorrow bids)

tasks.name: bid_reminder_imminent
tasks.description: Telegram afternoon check for sweet-spot bids due today

tasks.name: bid_reminder_new
tasks.description: Telegram alert for new strong-match bids (runs hourly)

tasks.name: cowork_sync
tasks.description: Pull claude.ai conversations + index into MemPalace

tasks.name: import_cowork
tasks.description: Index manually-dropped exports in data/cowork_imports/

tasks.name: cowork_local
tasks.description: Index local Claude Cowork sessions (desktop app)

tasks.name: sync_openclaw
tasks.description: Sync Carol AGENTS.md/USER.md to OpenClaw workspace (Telegram agent)

tasks.name: loss_postmortem_watch
tasks.description: Auto-investigate newly Lost bids: postmortem + Notes + Telegram

tasks.name: process_followup_replies
tasks.description: Auto-classify Inbox replies to follow-ups, update CRM, Telegram ping

tasks.name: crm_daily_summary
tasks.description: CRM status breakdown — morning briefing

tasks.name: crm_daily_summary
tasks.description: CRM status breakdown — end-of-day recap

tasks.name: followup_scheduler
tasks.description: Cadence engine: auto-FU + auto-close + phone flag
tasks._disabled_reason: Superseded by chase_silent_followups — conflicting cadence + stale Bid# mapping

tasks.name: daemon_self_health
tasks.description: Refresh daemon heartbeat file for external watchdog

tasks.name: team_chat_audit
tasks.description: Snapshot team Telegram transcripts (owner audit)

tasks.name: scrape_parkway
tasks.description: Scrape Parkway Construction portal (top GC) for nearby projects

tasks.name: scrape_procore
tasks.description: Scrape Procore sub bid invitations

tasks.name: team_chat_watcher
tasks.description: Real-time Telegram alert when teammate messages Carol

tasks.name: chase_silent_followups
tasks.description: Aggressive retry loop: keeps following up non-responders at days 3/7/14/21 until reply or 5 attempts

tasks.name: forward_div27
tasks.description: Auto-forward Division 27 (Communications/Low-Voltage/AV) bid invites to Hyperscale Wiring

tasks.name: apply_crm_formatting
tasks.description: Re-apply Sort Priority formula + sort sheet so newly added bids stay on top

tasks.name: lessons_audit
tasks.description: Verify Carol's code complies with AGENTS_LESSONS.md rules — catch regressions before user notices

tasks.name: hallucination_sentry
tasks.description: Ping Carol with truth-checkable questions and verify her answers vs ground truth files

tasks.name: cleanup_project_docs
tasks.description: Sunday 03:00 — delete bid doc folders for closed projects (Lost/Won/Withdrawn) older than 14 days
